themes.theme_summary: The overarching theme of these reviews is the dissatisfaction with the app's customer support, citing issues such as unhelpful responses, hidden charges, and technical glitches. This has led to a negative experience for many users.
quotes: 2 stars for 3rd class Customer support
Charges unnecessary hidden charges. Does not offer free online Closure and transfer service.
I have a very poor experience. Customer Support is pathetic.
action_ideas: Improve customer support responsiveness and quality
Review and revise pricing to eliminate hidden charges
Enhance technical support to address glitches and provide reliable solutions

themes.theme_summary: Users are experiencing various issues with the app, including technical problems, high brokerage, and concerns about the company's practices. These issues are leading to a negative experience and financial losses for some users.

Re-evaluate the brokerage fees to ensure they are competitive and fair

themes.theme_summary: The reviews express a mix of positive and negative sentiments about the app's quality, usability, and suitability for trading, with some users finding it excellent for beginners while others criticize its limitations and lack of control over trading. The feedback highlights the need for improvement in the app's features and user experience.
quotes: This app is only for beginners I mean only beginners use this aap but please stop using this aap in your starting journey at a time you will become habituated and then you will find this is worst aap
charge jada h aap ka
grow was a best platform in Indian market and minimum brokerage aap
action_ideas: Enhance the app's features to cater to both beginners and experienced traders
Implement a 'kill switch' to prevent overtrading and provide more control over trades
Review and adjust the brokerage charges to ensure they are competitive and reasonable

themes.theme_summary: The overarching theme of these reviews is the dissatisfaction with the trading experience on the Grow app, including issues with limit orders, stop losses, and order execution. Users are experiencing significant losses due to the app's alleged faults, leading to a loss of trust and negative reviews.
quotes: They took my limit order and treated it as a market order, and the stop loss hit too quickly, even though the price hadn’t reached that point
orders auto triggered even when price is near but not engaged with your limit price and no clear answers from support
your limit order is not working in options chains please try to fix it as may as possible
action_ideas: Improve the order execution system to accurately reflect user inputs, such as limit orders and stop losses
Enhance the user interface to provide clearer information about order status and execution
Implement measures to prevent auto-triggering of orders and provide more control to users

themes.theme_summary: The overarching theme of these reviews is that while users generally find the app good for investing, they experience various performance issues such as inaccurate data, lag, and withdrawal problems. These issues hinder the app's usability and affect trading decisions.

After the latest update, the app isn't working properly. Today's high and today's low prices are showing incorrect data.
some time instantly withdraw disabled, some time position not showing... this is some disadvantages... overall good app
action_ideas: Conduct a thorough review of the app's performance and data accuracy to identify and fix bugs
Optimize the app for smoother user experience, addressing lag and other usability issues
Implement robust testing before releasing updates to prevent introduction of new bugs
